title: To Apollo.
content:
Thou mighty lord and master of the lyre,
    Unshorn Apollo, come and re-inspire
    My fingers so, the lyric-strings to move,
    That I may play and sing a hymn to Love.
meaning:
"To Apollo." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
